---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an idea or improvement for Karna
title: ""
labels: enhancement
assignees: ""
---

## Problem

What are you trying to do, and what gets in the way today?

## Proposed solution

What you would like Karna to do. If it is a new operator, variable, action, or
config option, sketch how a rule or config would use it.

## Alternatives

Other approaches you considered, or how you work around it now.

## Context

Anything else that helps: CRS rule IDs, links, similar features elsewhere.
